findings.title: Query not trimmed before task-ID regex routing
findings.description: The handlers in epics.ts defensively trim their ID parameters, but the routing layer in index.ts tests the raw `query` against the task-ID regex without trimming. If query has surrounding whitespace, the regex won't match and the request is misrouted to `get_epic` instead of `get_task`. The handler then trims and performs an epic lookup that will fail with "not_found". Either trim `query` before the regex test so routing and handler behavior stay consistent.

findings.title: skills.ts misses same trim bug fixed in epics.ts
findings.description: The PR fixes whitespace-only task_id/epic_id validation in three epics.ts handlers (get_epic, list_tasks, get_task) by adding `.trim()` and checking falsiness. However, `skills.ts:306` has the identical pattern — `args.task_id as string` with only `!taskId` — which lets a whitespace-only `task_id` (e.g. `"   "`) pass validation and be sent to `stateManager.getTask("   ")`. This is the exact same class of bug being fixed in this PR.
